ephemeralOption: Set to "True" to show the response only to you
dxmTakingOption: What are you taking? All products (except RoboTablets) contain DXM hBr.
nasalCalculationTypeOption: Are you wanting to calculate the amount of solvent or substance?
nasalDesiredMgPerPushOption: Desired dose per push in mg
nasalMlPerPushOption: Excreted ml per push (look at the packaging)
psychedelicsDrugTypeOption: Are you wanting to calculate tolerance for LSD or Mushrooms?
errorDescription:
There was an error during conversion!
I've let the developer know, please try again with different parameters!
benzoEmbedTitle: {{dosage}} mg of {{drugA}} about equal to {{data}} mg of {{drugB}}
benzoEmbedDesc:
**Please make sure to research the substances thoroughly before using them.**
It's a good idea to start with a lower dose than the calculator shows, since everybody can react differently to different substances.
mdmaWarning: **It is not recommended to exceed 150mg of MDMA in a single session, including any redoses.** As dosage increases, so does the likelihood of experiencing negative side effects. Keeping doses in the light to medium range can help maximize pleasurable effects while minimizing discomfort. For more information check out [RollSafe](https://rollsafe.org/mdma-dosage/).
psychedelicTolerance: {{amount}} {{units}} of {{drug}} is needed to feel the same effects as
psychedelicToleranceWithDesiredDose: {{amount}} {{units}} of {{drug}} when {{lastDose}} {{units}} were taken {{days}} days ago.
psychedelicEstimate:
This ESTIMATE only works for lysergamides such as LSD and tryptamines such as Magic Mushrooms.
As all bodies and brains are different, results may vary.
[Credit to cyberoxide's Codepen](https://codepen.io/cyberoxide/pen/BaNarGd) and [AdmiralAcid's post on reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/LSD/comments/4dzh9s/lsd_tolerance_calculator_improved/)
benzoIHaveValidation: The parameter 'i_have' cannot be less than 0.001.
dxmWeightValidation: The parameter 'calc_weight' cannot be less than 1.
mdmaWeightValidation: The parameter 'weight' cannot be less than 1.
nasalValidation:
The parameters 'amount' and 'mlPerPush' cannot be less than 1,
and the parameter 'desiredMgPerPush' cannot be less than 0.001.
psychedelicValidation: The parameters 'last_dose_amount', 'desired_dose_amount', and 'days' cannot be less than 1.
ketamineWeightKgValidation: Please enter a weight less than 179 kg and greater than 1kg.
ketamineWeightLbsValidation: Please enter a weight less than 398 lbs and greater than 1 lb.
